case_title: LABORERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND vs. PAR CONCRETE INC.

docket_entries.description: CASE TERMINATED: 20-JAN-93 TERM CODE: J JUDGEMENT FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LABORERES HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAR CONCRETE INC. $6,751.76 PRINCIPAL, $1,025.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $846.94 INTEREST, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,724.70
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LABORERES HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABORERES HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PAR CONCRETE INC. SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-01-1993
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABORERES HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA SERVED NOV-12-1992, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAR CONCRETE INC.

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $120.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $244.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LABORERES HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PAR CONCRETE INC.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PAR CONCRETE INC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PAR CONCRETE INC.
ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED, ORDER SIGNED 4/13/93 DEFAULT OF JAN-07-1993 SET ASIDE, JUDGMENT OF JAN-20-1993 SET ASIDE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT PAR CONCRETE INC.
